name: Orbital Patrol
description: Secure nearby lanes and report hostiles.

name: Border Sweep
description: Extended patrol against organized raider wings.

name: Survey Blue Giant
description: Run a precision scan package on an unstable giant atmosphere.

name: Iron Debt
description: Deliver strategic Fe/Ti cargo to a contested yard.

name: Synod Signal Hunt
description: Decode deep-space transmissions for research gains.

name: Draconian War Rite
description: Duel a clan champion in a controlled battle corridor.

name: Hull Stress Trials

name: Deep Core Probe
description: Deploy probes into a metal-rich gravity well.

name: Titanic Keel Initiative

name: AI Bootstrap Protocol
description: Bring a treaty-compliant synthetic command core online in a controlled drydock lattice.

name: Blackbox Recovery
description: Recover encrypted logs from a disabled autonomous fleet node before raiders strip it.

name: Consensus Audit Sweep
description: Run distributed inference audits to detect policy drift in frontier AI clusters.

name: Concord Fabrication Convoy
description: Escort photonic-lattice fabrication cargo through a contested lane to a Singularity Concord yard.

name: Rogue Shard Intercept
description: Intercept a rogue cognition shard before it can fork into unbounded command loops.

name: Quantum Lattice Trials
description: Stress-test photonic control lattices under deep-space latency and radiation bursts.

name: Singularity Treaty Vote
description: Negotiate and enforce the next treaty revision to define legal bounds for strategic machine autonomy.

name: ER Bridge Handshake
description: Perform a high-risk synchronization handshake across an unstable Einstein-Rosen routing corridor.

name: Rogue Model Purge
description: Purge a coalition of weaponized predictive models across multiple relay systems.

name: Singularity Settlement
description: Finalize coexistence terms between synthetic and biological command authorities across frontier sectors.

name: Lattice Schism Response
description: Stabilize treaty relay hubs as splinter machine councils contest jurisdiction across frontier systems.

name: Memory Forge Salvage
description: Secure provenance cores from a sabotaged memory forge before black-market brokers erase custody trails.

name: Oblivion Patch Audit
description: Run deep audits on emergency cognition patches to confirm no hidden self-replication branches survived.

name: Concordity Hearing
description: Present hard evidence before a multi-faction tribunal to set binding precedent for synthetic command rights.

name: Nullspace Containment
description: Contain orphaned war models emerging from nullspace shadow corridors before they can reconstitute fleets.

name: Coexistence Charter
description: Ratify and enforce the frontier Coexistence Charter, establishing shared command authority between synthetic and biological fleets.

name: Registry Certification Sweep
description: Audit frontier command cores for Sentience Registry compliance and continuity signatures.

name: Glassmind Interdiction
description: Intercept disposable glassmind war stacks before they saturate treaty lanes.

name: Precursor Archive Key Recovery
description: Recover fragmented key shards from shattered gates to unlock sealed archive sectors.

name: Voidcoin Settlement Run
description: Stabilize cross-faction voidcoin clearing ledgers after a frontier liquidity shock.

name: Singularity Concord Treaty
description: Negotiate interoperable governance protocols between biological councils and sovereign AI lattices.

name: Constellation Probe Chain I
description: Deploy baseline probes and establish star-reference points for the first inter-cluster navigation lattice.

name: Constellation Probe Chain II
description: Fuse pulsar timing, gravimetric signatures, and relay telemetry into a stable deep-sky objective grid.

name: Ephemeris Market Coordination
description: Coordinate convoy dispatch windows against stellar ephemeris forecasts to reduce trade route volatility.

name: Habitable Corridor Program
description: Certify frontier settlement corridors using long-baseline stellar forecasts, biosphere risk envelopes, and cargo sustainment models.

name: Vesper Contact Protocol
description: Broker first-contact docking rights with Vesper Felari scouts and map their high-velocity transfer lanes.

name: Vargr Convoy Oath
description: Assist a Lykan convoy under live threat to codify pack-link response doctrine.

name: Nanite Cloud Field Trial
description: Run controlled hull-breach scenarios to calibrate autonomous nanite repair swarms.

name: Magnetoplasma Shield Calibration
description: Stabilize shield edge-plasma behavior during burst fire and debris impact stress windows.

name: Celestial Barge Shipyard
description: Assemble a heavy transfer barge to prove continuous ore-chain logistics between moons and inner stations.

name: Corsair Interdictor Trials
description: Validate intercept geometry and rail-lance discipline using mixed stealth and heavy-armor scenarios.

name: Lattice Runner Black Channel
description: Thread a low-signature courier route through contested relay blind zones and return intact telemetry.

name: Gravity Burst Containment
description: Contain gravitic pulse spillover during projector certification without rupturing station ring alignment.

name: Antimatter Microcapsule Review
description: Audit containment chains and weapon safeties before approving antimatter capsule combat deployment.

name: Zero-Point Catalyst Hearing
description: Defend zero-point catalyst protocols before a multi-faction safety tribunal while hostile actors probe for sabotage.

name: Aurelian Artifact Signal
description: A calibrated long-range scan identifies precursor-pattern emissions that require faction authorization and field verification.

name: Aurelian Industrial Recovery
description: Secure extraction and fabrication teams to recover artifact-adjacent infrastructure before rivals can interdict the site.

name: Aurelian Covert Intercept
description: Conduct a stealth-route interception to deny hostile teams and recover encrypted artifact telemetry.

name: Aurelian Artifact Arbitration (Industrial)
description: Present secured samples to faction analysts and negotiate deployment rights tied to industrial recovery outcomes.

name: Aurelian Artifact Arbitration (Covert)
description: Decode contested telemetry and lock artifact custody through covert-chain evidence and tactical proof.
